caption: The video features Kofi Bartels, a news anchor for PlusTV, presenting a segment titled "Plus Politics." He is dressed in a formal suit and tie, standing against a backdrop that includes a world map and the show's logo. The setting suggests a professional news studio environment. As he speaks, the lower third of the screen displays his name and Twitter handle, along with information on where viewers can watch the channel, including DSTV Channel 408 and StarTimes Channel 308. The segment appears to be focused on political discussions or news updates, as indicated by the title and the serious tone of the presentation.
